description: Reverts the Corepack-specific Yarn invocation from the 13.4 release branch VS Code extension build scripts. Internal Azure Pipelines builds blocked `corepack yarn@1.22.22` from downloading Yarn due to network isolation, causing extension builds to fail. The fix invokes the configured `yarn` executable directly while preserving the frozen-lockfile restore path.
name: Fix VS Code extension build scripts Corepack network failure
